name: Lentil-Nut Loaf (Am)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked AM Lentils - red or green
1 cup Ground nuts - walnuts, pecans or almonds
1 Garlic clove - mashed OR 1/2 tsp Garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients together.
2. Shape into a loaf and bake in a loaf pan at 350°F for 30 minutes.
3. Serve with any remaining tomato sauce, olives and parmesan cheese, or mushroom gravy, or garnish with chopped nuts or slivered almonds.
